reviews.title: Can’t get the weather to update
reviews.text:
Wish there were better instructions. Followed there “guide” for weather updates, still doesn’t work. Watch is slightly bigger than my Apple Watch. I also don’t love the sleep tracker. I don’t have traditional sleep schedule. So this watch stops tracking when I get up to go to bathroom. Only tracking half my sleep.
UPDATE: The weather has started working. Sleep is recorded as long as you don’t have lots of activity.

title: OCTANDRA Active VeryFitPro Fitness Tracker HR Heart Rate Sleep Monitor Step Counter IP67 Waterproof Activity Tracker Smart Band Pedometer Running Smart Watch for Men & Women (ID115Plus HR) (Black)
features: [Turn Your Good Intentions into Lifelong Habits] Get motivated and step up your daily activity goals with Octandra Active Fitness Watch for Men and Women! Apart from its main task of monitoring your health and fitness, it works as your personal digital assistant!

[Stay Active with Very Fit Pro] Download VeryFitPro from Google Play or App Store, pair the sports watch and start using its advanced health monitoring tools - Compatible with both Android 4.4, iOS 8.0 or above!

[All Day Fitness Tracker Watch] - Works as a heart rate monitor, step tracker and calorie counter. Also it monitors distance, pace and active minutes to give you a clear picture of your health and fitness!

[Advanced Sleep Tracker] Octandra Health Watch monitors the quantity and quality of your sleep and give clearer picture of how much quality sleep you’re getting! (Monitors deep sleep, light sleep, and awake time)
[Multi Sports Modes] With 14 sports modes, Octandra Smart Watches for Men and Women help you better understand each sport. (You can select 3 activity modes at a time via the app)

[Thoughtfully Crafted Design] Octandra Smart Bracelet features 0.96-inch Black and White OLED screen, IP67 waterproof design (Not suitable to wear while swimming or bathing. Can be worn while jogging in the rain or doing the dishes) and soft TPE straps which suit wrist sizes from 5.4 to 7.6 inches!

[Convenient USB Charging with Long-Lasting Battery] Enjoy 5-7 days of battery life with 1-2 hours charging time via built-in USB! (During actual use, battery life is related to various factors such as settings, operations, and operating conditions, and therefore may differ from the test conditions)
[A Sweet Life Companion] Never miss your calls, texts, and social app notifications with Octandra Active Exercise Watch!
[More Practical Tools] You can use our running watch as a stop watch, sedentary reminder, alarm watch, and camera shutter remote control of your smartphone!

[Important] This fitness band is not a medical device. All the measurement data and results are provided for reference only and cannot be compared with the results of professional medical devices, used to perform professional diagnosis or monitoring of any medical conditions. Due to external factors (such as arm hair, tattoos, or darker skin), there may be cases where measurement results are inaccurate or even unavailable!

reviews.title: Not a good buy
reviews.text: The 1st one I got "went crazy" and started just cycling thru the various screens on the watch.  I returned it and got a replacement because we all know that "stuff happens".  I got the replacement and it seemed to be working well until day 28, when it stopped connecting with the app at all, even though I installed and uninstalled it several times as the troubleshooting recommended.  Then it started draining my battery dry and that meant it needed to be returned.  Don't waste your money on this one unless you have LOTS of time to fiddle with it!

reviews.title: I can’t set the watch up to show the correct day time and rate
reviews.text: I can’t get it to work properly.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text: Perfect for keeping steps.

reviews.title: Good.
reviews.text: Good.

reviews.title: I wanted to like this product...
reviews.text:
I wanted a simple activity tracker and this looked like it was perfect. There are a number of things that worked well, battery life, simplicity, matched my needs... However, the accuracy is non existent. I was at the gym working out vigorously and my heart rate was 50 and dropping. I checked it with another app on my phone and I was approaching 140. When I am at rest it creeps into the 90's. by the way, I have entered all profile info. The steps are also way off as I tested against an app on my phone.

I tried but its not worth the effort.

reviews.text: The band fits as expected. I like the magnetic design and the magnet holds well. My problem with it is it gets caught on fabric and has pulled on some of my clothes. It also pinches sometimes.

reviews.title: Big upgrade over the original
reviews.text:
Feels great, doesn't leave marks on my skin which the fitbit one did. Only had to adjust it once, taking it off/on is like a rubber band.
Also I really like the way the metal looks for where it meets the fitbit

reviews.title: Finally a comfortable stretchy band
reviews.text: This watch band, that I have for my FitBit Inspire 2 is just what I was looking for. I hated the band that came with it.  I tried another buckle, cloth band, which was ok, but still a challenge to take on and off of my wrist.  This band is easy to attach to the Fit bit watch, and the length is adjustable (which I think is unusual for a slip-on stretchy band.  I even am ok with the multi color.  It makes it easy to pair up with lots of tops.  It can be adjusted in length to most everyone's wrist.  I have a very small wrist (short woman here) and I was able to make it small enough for me. But there is also a lot of room for expansion.

reviews.title: Very cute
reviews.text: Very cute but not durable at all! It’s already stretched out😢

reviews.title: Your “cake pants” band
reviews.text: This is super comfortable. I’ve got a few bands at this point. Resin (oooh, pretty). Leather (old school charm). Canvas (slick). Silicone, of course (modern). This one is like putting on your cake pants after Thanksgiving Dinner. It’s not the prettiest but it’s just fine. More than fine. You can live (too much?) in this thing…

reviews.title: great bands, they do take in sweat smell though
reviews.text: first bands to not give me a blister!! they do start to smell though with sweat, have to wash it frequently.

title: Apple Watch Series 8 [GPS + Cellular 41mm] Smart Watch w/Graphite Stainless Steel Case w/Midnight Sport Band-S/M. Fitness Tracker, Blood Oxygen & ECG Apps, Always-On Retina Display, Water Resistant
features: WHY APPLE WATCH SERIES 8 — Your essential companion for a healthy life is now even more powerful. Advanced sensors provide insights to help you better understand your health. New safety features can get you help when you need it. The bright, Always-On Retina display is easy to read, even when your wrist is down.

CELLULAR CONNECTIVITY — Send a text, make a call, and stream music without your iPhone, even while traveling internationally. Use Family Setup to manage Apple Watch for family members who don’t have an iPhone.
EASILY CUSTOMIZABLE — Available in a range of sizes and materials, with dozens of bands to choose from and watch faces with complications tailored to whatever you’re into.

INNOVATIVE SAFETY FEATURES — Crash Detection and Fall Detection can automatically connect you with emergency services in the event of a severe car crash or a hard fall. And Emergency SOS provides urgent assistance with the press of a button.

ADVANCED HEALTH FEATURES — Temperature sensing is a breakthrough feature that provides deep insights into women’s health. Keep an eye on your blood oxygen. Take an ECG anytime. Get notifications if you have an irregular rhythm. And see how much time you spent in REM, Core, or Deep sleep with Sleep Stages.

SIMPLY COMPATIBLE — It works seamlessly with your Apple devices and services. Unlock your Mac automatically. Find your devices with a tap. Pay and send money with Apple Pay. Apple Watch requires an iPhone 8 or later with the latest iOS version.
INCREDIBLE DURABILITY — Tougher than tough. It’s crack resistant, IP6X-certified dust resistant, and swimproof with WR50 water resistance.

A POWERFUL FITNESS PARTNER — The enhanced Workout app gives you new ways to train, and advanced metrics for more information about your workout performance. And Apple Watch comes with three months of Apple Fitness+ free.
APPS ON YOUR WRIST — With access to tens of thousands of apps on the App Store right on your wrist, Apple Watch is the perfect personal device for whatever you love to do.
LEGAL DISCLAIMERS — This is a summary of the main product features. See below to learn more.

reviews.title: Works - but prefer Samsung products
reviews.text: Long story short - I won an i phone 14 Plus.. I have been a Samsung owner for years including a galaxy watch. But because of the Samsung watch and the fact that if I left my phone at home or at the office I still was able to make and take calls, texts, etc - I purchased this Apple watch to go with  my new free phone (which has cost me a lot $$$ in accessories,  (chargers - what the hell Apple??) but to review the Apple Watch it functions - but I must say for the money it is lacking a lot based on the Galaxy watch.

reviews.title: Comfortable to wear and very functional
reviews.text: Comfortable to wear and very functional.  Excellent for exercising and playing sports

reviews.title: Great for outdoor exercise.
reviews.text: It gives me a skin reaction under the watch so have to put steristrips on my skin.  They don’t affect the watch accuracy, so a good solution to what seems to be a rather common problem.

reviews.title: It an apple watch!!!
reviews.text: If you liked the ones that came before you will love this one as well. Same product more features. Apple making sure that you keep on keeping on......making them money!

title: Garmin Forerunner 245, GPS Running Smartwatch with Advanced Dynamics, Berry
description: You do the running. Forerunner 245 does the thinking. This GPS smartwatch doesn’t just tell you where you ran. It tracks your stats, crunches the numbers and gets to know all about your performance, your running form, your training history and even your goals. All you need to focus on is putting one foot in front of the other.Bezel Material: fiber-reinforced polymer.
features: GPS running smartwatch with advanced training features
Battery life: up to 7 days in smartwatch mode and up to 24 hours in GPS mode
Get free adaptive training plans from Garmin Coach, or create your own custom workouts on our Garmin Connect online fitness community

Provides advanced running dynamics, including ground contact time balance, stride length, vertical ratio and more (When used with Running Dynamics Pod or HRM-Run or HRM-Tri monitors (sold separately))
Safety and tracking features include incident detection (during select activities) which sends your real-time location to emergency contacts through your paired compatible smartphone
Customize with free watch faces, apps and more from our Connect IQ store
Evaluates your current training status to indicate if you’re undertraining or overdoing it; offers additional performance monitoring features

reviews.title: great looking watch and great for running and biking
reviews.text:
I really like this watch. I replaced and old forerunner. (many generation old) It feels great and looks good since you can download and tailor the watch faces. I have downloaded music to it using MediaMonkey and it worked fine. So far, synching with earbuds Jaybird Tarah Pro and Vistas, has been good. The availability of watch faces and activity widgets is nice.
But
Be warned, it takes a little bit to set it up and understand how to understand how to download and update activity widgets. Updating of watch faces isn't too bad. Be patient and read the user guide, there is a lot of functionality you should be aware of whether you use them or not.

reviews.title: Great purchase
reviews.text:
Great, does all of the stuff running nerds love. Spotify is a hassle to sync when i want to adjust my playlists. This is especially annoying for podcast listeners such as myself. For this reason, I could have gone without the music upgrade and just used my phone but I still use the music feature a good amount for my shorter speed runs where I need the running jams!

But obviously I didn’t take a star because Garmin is the GOAT

reviews.title: Great watch
reviews.text: I bought this for my husband, an avid runner, for our anniversary. He is super into tracking, numbers, stats, etc. And he loves this watch! He previously had the Forerunner 235 Garmin but it was probably close to five years old. He had done alot of research on this one verses the newer models and this one still came out ahead and did not disappoint!

reviews.title: great fitness watch!
reviews.text: if you are looking for a smart watch, then this is not for you. however, if you want a fitness watch, then get this one! the gps tracking is great and accurate! it takes a little bit to get used to the buttons and where all the settings are, but i love that i can customize it to do just what i want in terms of display, audio outputs, etc. the band is comfortable and the watch face is a good size to see my stats while working out without being overly cumbersome (i'm a small 5'0" female). i love that it can play my spotify playlists! the only thing of note is that it will not be able to get any data such as weather, sms notifications, calendar updates, emails, phone calls, or send emergency assistance notices unless you have your phone with you and connected via bluetooth. the point of this watch for me was to keep my phone at home so those features don't work during my run, but it does do the fitness tracking and play previously setup spotify playlists, so it's exactly what i want and need. i don't use it for sleep tracking since i only wear it during workouts. love the heart rate monitoring too!

reviews.title: Sleep Tracking and Incoming Call Notification (on android) are EPIC failures
reviews.text:
Overwhelming 5 start reviews really make me skeptical that the reviews themselves are genuine....
Overall the watch is not bad but really needs functional work. The Android Dev/QA team should have some re-training/structuring after releasing this to the general public...
Sleep tracking shows me as sleeping if I am in bed relaxed watching tv during sleep hours, making it useless. I only receive an incoming call notification on the watch if my phone screen is unlocked...
missed calls come in every time..

no problems with GPS, Battery Life, Music , Bluetooth, feeds to 3rd party athletic tracking apps. all those work fine.

Not sure I would buy this again.

No reason to take off a star.  Great product at a great price.

title: Samsung Galaxy Watch3 2020 Smartwatch (Bluetooth + Wi-Fi + GPS) International Model (Bronze, 41mm)
description: The only smartwatch with a precise rotating bezel for navigating between apps. Larger screen, but lighter and thinner for more comfort: With its subtle rotating bezel, it's easier to see and focus on what's important on an even larger screen. The Galaxy Watch3 is thinner and smaller, and up to 15% lighter with a sophisticated look that, thanks to its reduced frame, is perfect for the wrist. Breathe easier with built-in oxygen measurement: The Galaxy Watch3 uses red LEDs and infrared rays to calculate your SpO2 levels or the amount of oxygen in your blood. Because oxygen saturation is directly related to physical activity, you can use the Galaxy Watch3 to push your routine to the next level. Enjoy a better sleep: The Galaxy Watch3 records your active sleep, deep sleep, and total sleep time to keep track and improve the quality of your sleep. Samsung partnered with the National Sleep Foundation to include educational content and provide tips on your device to help you sleep better. Do your best and then repeat it: With over 120 home workout programs to choose from, the Galaxy Watch3 helps you move your body at your own pace. Pick one from your phone and stream it on your TV. It will show you your heart rate in real-time while you exercise. Use the Ridge Sport strap for even more accurate stats. Continue your conversations: When you receive a new message, the Galaxy Watch3 shows your conversation history so you can follow them. You can also view images without needing an extra touch, making it easier to keep up while you're working out. Add some context with the smart answer: Respond to messages at all times and without missing a beat. The Galaxy Watch3's smart reply analyzes the texts and photos you receive and gives you possible answers in different categories, such as food, celebrations, selfies and much more.

reviews.title: Not durable, hard to latch
reviews.text:
I liked the shape of this band and how it looked on my sense. Unfortunately it was less than a week before it started snagging on blankets and towels. Then it started snagging my tighter woven clothes. Within a couple of weeks the area that was snagging on things bent outward resulting in it scratching myself and others along with snagging anything that got close to it.

It is also very hard to do the clasp with one hand. At least if you have a reduced level of manual dexterity. I did figure out how to put it on. Taking it off is easier.

I can't recommend this item. I sent it back for a refund.

reviews.title: Colorful band
reviews.text: I love the color . The band narrows once it comes off the fitbit. My only dislike is the extra band goes under the band instead of on top.

reviews.title: I have a love hate relationship with this band.
reviews.text: I love the look of this band on my Fitbit, it matches perfectly. How you fasten it is kind of a pain. It slips through and runs under itself, which prevents a floppy tail of band, but it can be tricky to do and adjust. Everything else about the band is great. It's lightweight, matches my Fitbit perfectly, and is easy to clean.

reviews.title: Nice Band
reviews.text: I like having options when it comes to the band of my Fitbit Versa3. This one looks nice. It's a little less casual than the silicone ones. It fits my Versa fine and was easy to attach. I wear my Fitbit on my left arm (I'm right handed). I found it a little more difficult to put on my wrist than my other bands. I was able to get it, but it took a few tries. Once on my wrist, my Versa feels secure and I'm not concerned about it coming undone.

reviews.title: Super Cute
reviews.text: Loving this wristband. It fits great and stays on without problems. Totally adjustable and wears really nicely. Couldn't be happier with this wristband.

title: Garmin Forerunner® 955 Solar, GPS Running Smartwatch with Solar Charging Capabilities, Tailored to Triathletes, Long-Lasting Battery, Whitestone
description: Lead the pack with Forerunner® 955 Solar, the premium GPS running and triathlon smartwatch with Power Glass™ solar charging to extend battery life. The training readiness feature tells you when you’re primed for a productive session — while daily suggested workouts adapt to your performance and recovery alongside the race widget, which provides training tips, course details and completion time predictions. With morning report, you can get an overview of your sleep, recovery, training and more — as well as a picture of your overall health with heart rate variability (HRV) status (This device is intended to give an estimate of your activity and metrics). On the run, new multi-band GPS and full-color, built-in maps help you navigate confidently. And with traditional buttons and a touch display, it has never been easier to tap into your training status and know whether you’re training productively, peaking or strained. If you’re pushing toward the podium — or to the very limits — Forerunner 955 Solar is by your side with up to 20 days of battery life with solar charging in smartwatch mode (assuming all-day wear with 3 hours per day outside in 50,000 lux conditions).
features: Built with an always-on, full-color display that’s light on the wrist and easy to read even in direct sunlight

Battery life: up to 20 days of battery life in smartwatch mode for a full picture of your health — from sleep to training (assuming all-day wear with 3 hours per day outside in 50,000 lux conditions); up to 42 hours in GPS mode and up to 49 hours with solar charging (assuming continuous use for entire period in 50,000 lux conditions); up to 110 hours in UltraTrac mode with solar charging (assuming use in 50,000 lux conditions)
Click or swipe through maps and stats with traditional button controls or a new, responsive touchscreen
Whether you’re running on city streets or riding densely covered trails, Forerunner 955 provides full-color, built-in mapping to keep you on track

Access multiple global navigation satellite systems, and get access to multiple frequencies sent by navigation satellites for improved accuracy in areas where GNSS signals are reflected, weak or typically don't penetrate — giving you superior accuracy for how far and how fast you’ve run — even in challenging environments
From the moment you wake up, get a training readiness score based on your sleep quality, recovery, training and more, so you can determine whether it’s a good day to go hard — or take it easy
Get ready for your next race with race widget — which provides training tips, personalized daily suggested workouts and completion time predictions based on course details, weather and performance

Using new indicators such as HRV status, your recent exercise history and performance, get an easy insight into your overall effort with training status — and know whether you’re training productively, peaking or strained

Receive an overview of your sleep, recovery and training outlook as soon as you wake up with morning report — alongside HRV status, training readiness and weather; you can even customize your report to show what you want to see (This device is intended to give an estimate of your activity and metrics)

With HRV status, gain a deeper understanding of your overall health, recovery and training performance through heart rate variability while you sleep, based on technology developed by our Firstbeat Analytics team (This device is intended to give an estimate of your activity and metrics)

reviews.title: A great watch for a runner
reviews.text: Haven't found anything I don't like about this watch.  Have begun following it's training advice, and it appears to be working.  Provides a wealth of interesting information.  One real plus for us old guys: the face is larger than the 735XT making it easier for these old eyes to read it.

reviews.title: Buena compra
reviews.text: Llego excelente, bien empacado

reviews.title: Resumen de datos y métricas de seguimiento
reviews.text: Verdaderamente útil, el seguimiento de sueño, entreno, potencia, y muchos mas datos que nos permiten dar un seguimiento más preciso del estado físico.

reviews.title: VO2 and race prediction are garbage
reviews.text:
For some reason with the 955 - Garmin decided to stop updating VO2 and race prediction - so if you have come to rely/look at that - don't get this watch. They have tried fixing it with the last few beta updates, but they can't seem to figure out how to correct it.

Multi-band GPS is nice - which honestly is the only reason we all haven't moved back to the 945/735 - which are AMAZING watches.

reviews.title: Fantastic update
reviews.text:
The 955 is a fantastic update over the previous 9XX, 7XX, and 6XX models. This update I'd much more communicative and provides loads more encouraging updates and workout suggestions. The interface is also more fluid than previous models. The return of touch to the user interface is nice but, optional.

Definitely worth going with

title: Smart Watch for Men iPhone Android, Smartwatch with Alexa Built-in (Answer/Make Call), 1.7" Fitness Tracker for Heart Rate Sleep Tracking, 60 Sports, Blood Oxygen, Black
features: 【Smart Watch Bluetooth Call, Alexa and Smart Notification】 After connecting the watch with your phone, you can directly dial the phone number on the screen to make or answer the call. Built-in Alexa can help you with your daily life. Also you can receive SMS and APP messages (Text, Facebook, WhatsApp, Instagram, Twitter...) you won't miss any important information

【24H Accurate Health Monitoring】Measure your Heart Rate, Blood Oxygen, Pressure with this smart watch. Understand your physical state, especially for high-intensity or outdoor work such as high temperature, brainstorming, stay-up and get professional analysis on how to relax in a healthier and better way. AEAC smart watch also analyzes sleep quality and score your sleep quality to help you adjust your sleep habits

【60 Sports Modes & Fitness Tracker】AEAC Fitness Tracker supports 60 sports such as walking, running, mountaineering, swimming, yoga, hiking, cycling, treadmill, etc . Accurately record all-day activities like steps, distance, calories burned, miles walked, active minutes and give professional analysis on improving your sports and daily habit

【1.7" HD Full Touch Screen and Smart Life Partner】Check daily workout clearly on a 1.7'' HD bright color display. Create customized fitness schedules and goals, Get vibration alerts for all notifications, including phone calls, texts, and social media app alerts. Never miss a message with smart notifications delivered right to your wrist. You also can check real-time weather and change your music on the smartwatch

【IP68 Waterproof ＆ 21 Day Battery Life】Fully charge for 2 hours, support 21 days standby time. Large capacity and low power consumption design offers longer endurance. AEAC smart watch is designed with IP68 waterproof, you can wear it when washing hands, in the rain and swimming

reviews.title: Excellent buy
reviews.text: Very affordable price, Ease to use, and durable battery. Really satisfied with this smart watch

reviews.title: It’s ok but not what I expected!
reviews.text: It’s ok but not what I expected!

reviews.title: Very stylish
reviews.text: Just what I was looking for and very stylish.

reviews.title: worth the try, gorgeous clear display, ease of use, fits my 7" wrist,
reviews.text:
It's pretty good, especially if you dont need a name brand. It has a beautifully clear display. Easy to install app and pairs well with no hassle. Has all the bells and whistles of name brand products. While I prefer fitbit due to familiarity.

I havent put it entirely through its paces. I noticed that it was registering nearly same heart rate as my fitbit sense. I havent it worn it long enough to determine blood oxygen. There is still a lot to learn. The learning curve feels a little clunky compared to my fitbit.

Has ability to connect to Alexa, take and make calls, music. Can make changes through app or scroll through the screen face.

The watch band fits my 7" wrist and feels comfortable enough. Typical silicone band. It is attached via pins, so I imagine it is possible to swap it out but not sure. I may try some old bands to see if it is doable. I'd also prefer for it to have a soft protective cover (bumper guard) to protect screen and edges.

I still prefer the ease of using a name brand, but this has a good looking interface. Main thing is to see how accurate it is. I think it has been fine for heart rate, steps, but will need more sleep time for seeing how well it tracks sleep and oxygen.

I dont rate on price, but I comment. This is pretty reasonable, but it looks like there are many similar products for less. So compared to a name brand of similar features this is a bargain. Compared to other no name generics, this is competitive. Some are easily $20 less. I noticed the price on this vacillates. I think I got it for $70, and have seen it as low as 35-40.

reviews.title: It’s ok
reviews.text: The oxygen part of the watch is not accurate.

title: Garmin 010-02172-31 Vivoactive 4S, Smaller-Sized GPS Smartwatch, Features Music, Body Energy Monitoring, Animated Workouts, Pulse Ox Sensors and More, Light Gold with Light Pink Band
description: Tune in to your body, and tone up with the 40 mm vívoactive 4S GPS smartwatch. It has the broadest available range of all-day health monitoring features, music storage and on-screen, Animated workouts To help you reach your goals. Boost every activity by downloading your favorite Spotify® or Deezer (may require a premium subscription With a third-party music provider) playlists straight to your watch.
features: Keeps track of your energy levels, Pulse Ox (this is not a medical device and is not intended for use in the diagnosis or monitoring of any medical condition), respiration, menstrual cycle, stress, sleep, estimated heart, hydration and more

Easily download songs to your watch, including playlists from Spotify, Amazon music or Deezer (may require a premium subscription With a third-party music provider), and connect with headphones (sold separately) for phone-free listening
Record all the ways to move with more than 20 preloaded GPS and indoor sports apps, including yoga, running, swimming and more. Display resolution:218 x 218 pixels
Get easy-to-follow, animated workouts right on your watch screen, including strength, cardio, yoga and Pilates
Battery life: Up to 7 days in smartwatch mode; Up to 5 hours in GPS and music mode
Personalize your watch with thousands of free watch faces, apps and widgets from our Connect IQ store
Garmin Pay contactless payment solution (not all countries and payment Networks are eligible) lets you pay for purchases with your watch
Safety and tracking features include incident detection (during select activities) and assistance (when paired with a compatible device), which both send your real-time location to emergency contacts
Stay connected with smart notifications (when paired with a compatible device), for incoming calls, text messages, calendar reminders and more
Garmin Coach provides free 5K, 10K and half-marathon training plans that guide you to reach your race goal and adjust based on your performance in the plan

reviews.title: Everything and more from what i expected from a smart watch
reviews.text: i spent a great deal of time researching smart watches, Garmin came up the winner.  I have dealt with their customer service on two occasions with another product and found them to be excellent which i a big reason for buying another Garmin product.

reviews.title: Poor battery life, feature rich
reviews.text:
If only the battery life was better... I have the GPS turned off and I only measure my blood oxygen level when I'm asleep yet it is nearly impossible for the watch to last a little more than 24 hours.

My next Garmin will be the one with a solar powered assist.

That being said for the negatives this watch has the features I wanted at a good price:

- Sleep quality/quantity
- Blood oxygen level
- Steps counter
- Flight of stairs counting
- Water intake recording ) manual input)
- Multiple activities recording (it can detect when I'm running, bike riding, etc.)

It has been durable and the screen is still scratch free.

If poor battery life isn't a deal breaker buy it.

reviews.title: After a year and a half...can't wait to switch, Spotify is the worst part of this watch by far
reviews.text:
I have owned this watch for a year and a half now. I use it almost daily for my walks/runs, weight workouts, and indoor bike workouts. The main reason I chose this watch in the first place was because it was one of the smaller ones available. I am 5'9 but have small wrists, and really disliked the 'utilitarian' look of larger watches. After a year and a half, I am so tired of the issues with it and ready to jump ship. If I used this watch more regularly (I only wear it for workouts - not all day), I would have switched a LONG time ago. The amount of people who have complained about the same issues for YEARS without Garmin doing anything makes me hesitant to purchase another Garmin product, especially with the Apple Watch, Samsung, and now Google buying out Fitbit and coming up with a watch.
- Spotify on this watch seriously sucks. If you check Spotify forums, you will find COUNTLESS threads of suggestions for the Spotify app on this watch that should truly be basic features at this price. Do they implement them or listen? No. Also, there is no way to contact Spotify customer service - you just get pointed towards their 'community forum' where you have people complaining of the same exact things with no fix. You can't skip forward on any track, at all. I listen to a lot of podcasts when I walk. Some are 2 hours in length while my walk is only 1 hour. This watch constantly either reverts to the very beginning of my podcast so I have to start all over (because again, you can't skip forward - so have fun listening to ads as well!) in anything, only updates 1 song out of 15 on my playlist or get the error 'sync failed', or some other random issue. Also, if you have a playlist on Spotify, you cannot choose the track you want to listen to. You have to hit the >> button to get to where you want. Really? I hope Garmin drops Spotify because they have been a truly horrible app on this watch the entire time with no effort to make updates. Take a look at the reviews of Spotify on the Garmin store if you don't believe me.
- Battery life is a couple of days. However, there are points in time where my watch will be at say 80% the night before, I get ready to leave and go my walk the next morning, pick up my watch, and it's at 8%. WTF? This happens enough to be super annoying and apparently is not an 'only me' problem. It appears to be tied to when the watch updates.
- I tried to wear this to track my sleep in the beginning and gave up after two nights due to the extreme disco effect of the 'gesture' motions. I tried turning on the 'do not disturb' function advertised on the watch which is supposed to disable this stupidly bright light that WILL wake you and whoever is next to you up. Didn't work. Do a search for 'Garmin watch lights up in middle of the night' and you will find all sorts of people complaining of the same thing, and not just on this version of the watch.
- GPS has issues connecting and can take several minutes which is pretty annoying when you try to start tracking an activity only to see a red bar when trying to connect. I 'sync' my watch to my phone constantly so that is not the issue. I have switched between the GPS options Garmin offers on the watch to no avail. Search for this issue as well and you will see lots of people with the same complaint.

reviews.title: GET THIS WATCH!!!
reviews.text: I LOVE this watch!!! It is so easy to use, tracks all of the metrics I am interested in (steps, sleep, stress, activities, hydration, menstrual cycle) and then some!! It is very accurate and the app is very user- friendly. The watch itself has worked perfectly and I have found it to be comfortable and intuitive to use.  It holds a charge for several days on end and when it does need to be charged, it reaches full battery very quickly! I looked at a lot of different watches and considered a lot of different options. I am so happy that I went with the vivoactive 4! Garmin, you all did a great job with this watch!! I honestly could not be happier with my choice!!

reviews.title: A Gift that went well
reviews.text:
This was a Christmas gift for my wife to replace her older Vivosmart. She wanted the new features but she has a small wrist.
Doing some searches I thought this would be as big as I should try.

All went well. It does all she needs and while it's much better it's not too big. Doing larger does add more battery time and more features, but this is the right fit for her
